lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The body is free of rust, scratches, and dents. Mechanically, the engine and transmission function as new. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and staining. Mechanical components are functional but will require maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic restoration to be roadworthy. The exterior shows significant wear, including several large dents, deep scratches, and noticeable rust on the body panels. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears, and many interior components are missing or broken. Mechanically, the engine has a significant leak and the transmission slips, meaning it will likely need a complete overhaul. This car is being sold as-is and is ideal for a dedicated project or as a source for parts.

Looking for an affordable project or a budget-friendly way to get behind the wheel? This vehicle offers a fantastic opportunity for someone handy with a wrench! While it currently requires significant mechanical attention and shows substantial wear and tear throughout, it remains a great candidate for a restoration project or as a parts vehicle. If you're looking for a diamond in the rough to bring back to life with some dedicated TLC, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior remains very clean, with only a few minor stone chips on the hood and light surface scratches that are barely noticeable. Inside, the upholstery is in great shape with minimal wear on the driver's seat bolster, and all electronic features are fully functional. It drives smoothly and has a consistent service history, making it a reliable and attractive option for its next owner.

Presenting a refined example of engineering excellence, this vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and showing pride of ownership, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking quality and value. Every aspect of this vehicle has been vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal.

Hey everyone! Looking for a reliable ride that’s been loved and well-cared for? I’m parting ways with my trusty car! It’s in wonderful shape, runs like a dream, and is totally ready for its next big adventure. It's been super dependable for me, and I know it'll make its next owner very happy. Drop me a message if you'd like to come by and take it for a spin!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering 414 hp with a spine-tingling 8,400 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a Variable M Differential Lock. This vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and reliability, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use, while the interior remains a clean, smoke-free environment with supple upholstery and fully functional electronics. Whether you are commuting daily or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car offers a tight, responsive driving experience that feels both premium and dependable. It is a solid, honest example of a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for its next chapter.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable daily driver, and she’s looking for a new home! This car has been super dependable for me and is still in great shape for all your adventures. It’s been well-maintained, runs smoothly, and is ready to hit the road today. Perfect for anyone looking for a solid ride that won't let them down. Clean title. Reliable engine. Well-maintained interior. Minor surface wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior boasts a deep, vibrant shine with only the lightest signs of road use, while the interior remains a sanctuary of comfort, featuring clean, well-preserved upholstery and a fully functional suite of modern tech amenities. Under the hood, the engine performs flawlessly, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and a recent comprehensive service. The suspension is tight, the brakes are responsive, and the transmission shifts with precision, ensuring a smooth and confident driving experience. Complete with a detailed service history and a smoke-free cabin, this car is a prime example of pride of ownership. It is ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable, high-quality performance.

Hey there! If you're looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-taken care of, you’ve found it! This car has served me so well and still runs like a dream. It's got plenty of life left in it and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner. Come take it for a spin—you won’t be disappointed!

This E46 M3 features the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a high-compression head for exceptional throttle response. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. Mechanically sound, the VANOS system is quiet and the subframe has been proactively inspected for structural integrity. Suspension geometry remains true with refreshed control arm bushings, ensuring the chassis maintains its legendary balance and feedback. While exhibiting minor cosmetic wear expected of a driven enthusiast vehicle, its performance remains sharp and the engine pulls strongly to its 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the lightest signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain free of major curb rash. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin where the premium upholstery and soft-touch surfaces have been preserved with regular conditioning. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is turn-key ready; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, providing a smooth, responsive drive with crisp gear shifts and confident braking. With a complete service history and tires in excellent health, this car offers a premium driving experience for its next discerning owner.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior paint presents beautifully, retaining a high-gloss finish with only minor, age-appropriate imperfections such as small stone chips on the lower front fascia. All body panels are original and perfectly aligned, reflecting a history of careful ownership. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and confident braking performance.
